reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: This hotel has clean bathrooms, comfortable sizes, along with functioning WIFI and hot water, providing a pleasant experience. The location is quite convenient, with a view of the greenhouse, but if you want to stay close to the center, shopping areas, and entertainment, this could be a limitation. The amenities meet basic needs, and the staff is friendly.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
The room is still new, clean, has windows, so it's bright, and the view at night is very beautiful. It is equipped with hand soap, while some places only have shampoo and body wash. The bathroom does not have dividers, but it is spacious and also has a window; however, next to it is a construction site, so it can be a bit noisy and dusty (closing the door will minimize this). 

One downside is that the paper towels in the bathroom are not of high quality. I am on the B1 floor, and I don't know if the floors above or below have a laundry room, but I keep hearing what sounds like a washing machine running, even though the sound is quite faint. It is a quiet location, but being on a hill, it's not close to many restaurants or cafes, so having a vehicle would make it more convenient to get around.

reviews.title: RẤT TỆ
reviews.positives: Cô chủ thân thiện
reviews.negatives:
Sau vài lần lưu trú thì thật sự thất vọng về cách ứng xử của KS với khách. Tôi chia se để mọi người lưu ý về KS này. 

1/ Thái độ nhân viên mất lịch sự với khách lưu trú. Đổ thừa và vu khống cho Khách làm hư hại Tài sản của KS với lý do vô lý “ Tắm để hơi nóng bám vào vật dụng trong phòng gây hư hại ?????”. Bản thân mình đã sử dụng dịch vụ khách sạn rất nhiều nơi từ * đến ***** nhưng chưa bao giờ lại bị Ks xúc phạm như vầy. Thật sự thất vọng về KS.
2/ Hệ thống Pccc của KS này bản thân mình không biết họ có đạt chuẩn hay không ??? Nhưng hiện tại rất bất cập khi yêu cầu Khách “ Sử dụng nước nóng phải chờ hết hơi nước mới được mở cửa…??? Tại sao lại có sự vô lý như vậy. Nếu KS ở vùng miền khác thì không nói nhưng đây là ĐL thời tiết lạnh, không khí có độ ẩm rất cao việc đọng sương , hơi nước trên các vật dụng là hiển nhiên. Tuy nhiên KS lại đổ lỗi cho khách vì nội dung này ….. còn nhiều cái không hài lòng tại KS này. Mọi người hãy lưu ý và làm rõ trước khi lưu trú để tránh việc Mất tiền và ấm ức giống gia đình mình. 
Cảm ơn Cô Chủ thân thiện tại KS. Nhưng 1 mình Cô thân thiện là chưa đủ bù lại sự thiếu chuyên nghiệp và cách ứng xử thiếu tôn trọng Khách của cấp dưới.
Chúc Cô Chủ thân thiện thành công. Hẹn ngày không gặp lại !!!

reviews.title: Một kỳ nghỉ cực kì tệ tại Ks Sunset Hill Hotel
reviews.negatives: Mình đã có một kỳ nghỉ cực kì tệ ở ks này. Mình là khách đã ở ks này rất nhiều lần rồi. Tuy nhiên, lần này tụi mình vẫn ở như bình thường. 9h sáng nhân viên khách sạn đập cửa phòng mình với thái độ cực tệ nói rằng do phòng mình tắm mở cửa nhà tắm nên làm hệ thống báo cháy của ks. Nói rằng tất cả các phòng mình ở trước đây đều phải đưa vào bảo trì k thể sử dụng cho khách khác thuê đc và đã đc chụp hình lưu lại sau mỗi lần mình ở( trước nay mình ở k nói gì về vấn đề này). Hệ thống PCCC của ks phải đảm bảo để khi khách hàng lưu trú k xảy ra sự cố chứ. Giống như mình là nguyên nhân làm hư hại tài sản của ks vậy. Ủa, Mình bỏ tiền ra mua dịch vụ mà, mình đâu có đi xin đâu. Và mình đã nhận đc thông báo là ks sẽ k cho phép mình checkin tại đây nữa. Làm dịch vụ mà quá là tệ, cực kì tệ. Tụi mình vẫn đang trong thời gian nghỉ nhưng bị ks đập cửa làm phiền với lời nói to tiếng và KHÔNG MỘT LỜI XIN LỖI😡😡

reviews.title: Nice hotel getaway in the hills
reviews.text: Our stay overall was pleasant since the room had an amzing view, the room was clean and the location was nice. However we had some inconveniences such as the property rents scooters for 130k (good price) but they refused to rent it to us eventhough we have a special international driver licence that is valid here in Vietnam. So we had to drive downtown to rent it at a local shop which was super easy in the end just annoying that it took 2 hours of our time. Another minus was that the staff didn‘t do our room (no room service) so the room wasn‘t made and no water that they offer each day (charged us since we took one of the minibar).

reviews.title: Quality is commensurate with the price.
reviews.text: The room and bathroom are quite spacious, and the living space is comfortable. There is a large window, but unfortunately, the hotel is positioned to view a construction site (luckily it's during the Tết holiday, so it wasn't noisy). The room has clean wooden flooring, which helps keep the feet warm. There are many power outlets, which is very convenient. The room is equipped with a hairdryer, and the hotel also provides a steam iron for borrowing. The soundproofing is poor; conversations from outside can be heard clearly and loudly. The hot water is quick and strong. The bed is not too soft, just mediocre, and there are plenty of pillows available. The laundry price at the hotel is 30,000 VND/kg (twice as high as outside).

reviews.text: Everything is literally new and clean. We could really see that they opened recently. There wasn’t AC in the room tho, the weather in Dalat is chilly so we didn’t really need it. It is kinda far away from the central city(you might need to rent a car or use Grab app) but the price was worth it. We stayed another night at this hotel. 깨끗하고 정말 다 새 거여서 좋았어요. 조용한 걸 좋아하시면 더 유명해지기 전에 가보시는 걸 추천드려요. 조식은 없습니다. 개인 택시/차량을 이용해야 갈 수 있는 위치입니다.

reviews.title: I highly recommend it!
reviews.text: Super nice hotel, it's not too hard to get to for us. I stayed for 5 nights and experienced 2 rooms, one with a balcony and one with a garden. I preferred the garden because there are places to eat and have coffee, and the flower garden is very chill. The hosts are really friendly and lovely, always smiling. The receptionist is a bit reserved but very helpful. The room is clean and the cleaning is very thorough. I will definitely come back.

reviews.text: From a young age, both the staff and the owners have been incredibly enthusiastic. On the day I checked out, there was a construction traffic jam on the road, so the taxi couldn't pick me up. The hotel had staff assist with using a motorcycle to carry my suitcase to the taxi. The room was also clean, fragrant, and quiet. It was truly very nice 🥹

reviews.title: Worth the price.
reviews.text: I stayed in a room priced at 400k (with an Agoda discount code). What I liked most here is that the staff is incredibly friendly and supportive. The room is quite cozy, of just the right size, and fully equipped. However, one thing to be careful about is the way to enter the hotel. It's easy to get there, but there are many roads leading to it, so I got a bit confused. I got lost around 9 PM when the road was quite deserted =))) and I was pretty scared =)) Overall, I would still recommend this hotel and give it 5 stars for the spacious and poetic view.

reviews.title: Traveling to Da Lat
reviews.text: Walking in, you can see an elegant beauty. The receptionist is very enthusiastic, and the owner is beyond reproach, nothing to complain about. The soundproofing from the outside is a bit lacking. But the guests are very polite, not too noisy. The room is beautiful, clean, and spacious; the bathroom is amazing. A perfect ten. Anyone renting a motorbike should check with the hotel in advance, as the hotel owner advises to arrange the bike beforehand.

reviews.title: New room, clean and beautiful.
reviews.text: I booked it because the price is very reasonable. It's right at Sunset Hill :)) The afternoon sun is just incredible. I really like the bathroom and the room in this hotel, because I don't like cramped bathrooms at home with small children, so I wanted a spacious one to bathe the baby and use a separate sink outside to avoid getting wet. My husband told me the bathroom makes the 1m2 bed feel a bit cramped :))) Hahaha, given the price, it's just wonderful, and since it's newly built, everything is very clean; they change the towels and clean the room without being asked. I would give it 10 points, but the access road is a bit narrow, making it difficult for cars to turn around. There are two access routes, so it's not a dead end, and it's right in the center, making it convenient to move to various points.

The staff here are very friendly, especially the owner (manager) who is always very supportive of the guests. The rooms are very clean and fresh, cleaned daily. The bed pillows are very comfortable, and the furnishings are still very new. The rental price for motorbikes here is cheaper compared to many other areas, and the bikes are modern. The amenities are fully equipped as described.

The hosts (owners) are extremely friendly and hospitable; they low-key made us want to have a hotel in Dalat at their age. Anyway, I'm looking forward to coming back soon, especially for next year's meteor shower. 🥰🫶🏼

I will definitely recommend it to my acquaintances if they come to Da Lat.

reviews.title: The quality is well worth the price.
reviews.text: Last time I booked my husband to run a trail race in Da Lat, the price was cheap so I didn't have high expectations, but when we got back, he praised the cleanliness and amenities of the place. The whole family went to play and we booked the entire home, which was really nice. So this year, since it's my turn to run in the race, I chose this place to be nearby. Unfortunately, the race was postponed due to the storm 🥹 I haven't stayed there yet, but the home handled the reservation quite reasonably, giving it a 10 out of 10.

reviews.title: The hotel is very clean and spacious.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It's probably the cleanist room I have stayed in while visiting Vietnam. Indeed very good for people with e.g. allergies. Modern, spacious, super comfy, somewhat nice personal.
reviews.negatives:
There is a construction side right next to it. It strts at 8 am, so it was okay since I used it as my personal alarm. 

You pay up front for everything. I had my clothes washed and it wasnt much money but still I had to pay right away. Found it a bit weird but they did that with everyone, so it wasn't a discriminitory thing.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: The bed is good for best sleeping, but the sound of construction will wake you up in the morning
reviews.positives:
Very cool bed. It's a pleasure to sleep on it. 4 pillows and a warm huge blanket and a comfortable mattress. The best bed. 
We were moved to a higher room, thank you very much to the staff. 
The view is gorgeous.
reviews.negatives:
It is very noisy in the morning, there is a construction site nearby, you can see it from the window. 
Everything in the bathroom is wet, since there is no separation between the shower area and the toilet. 
The staff is not very talkative. Little space to put things

Một điểm trừ đó là toilet phòng mình có mùi rất khai, ko biết vì sao nhưng mỗi lần mở của toilet là bịt mũi luôn.
Nói chung book trên Agoda được giá quá okie, nên mình highly recommend chỗ này nha.

reviews.title: Sunset Hill Hotel
reviews.text: My husband and I have been here many times. Everything is perfect. Friendly staff, clean rooms, and an excellent lantern view.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Very good facilities at reasonable price

SunsetHill Hotel is definitely worth experiencing when you visit Dalat. Everything from the rooms being extremely clean, the enthusiastic staff, the convenient location, to the view of the street market for nighttime enjoyment. It is my usual stop when I come to Dalat. I'm sure you, like me, will visit once and want to return forever. ❤️

reviews.title: Definitely coming back.
reviews.text: I am particular, so it's hard for me to stay in a dirty room. The biggest impression was the bathroom with a white seal, everything was clean, and the bathroom floor had no dampness at all. The room was tidy, the bedding was clean, and the closet had no dust. I'm very satisfied and hope the hotel continues to maintain this standard; I will definitely come back.

reviews.title: WILL COME BACK
reviews.text:
HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
- I stayed for 3 nights after the April 30th - May 1st holiday, so the hotel could assist me with early check-in.
- The room is decorated in a minimalist style but has all the amenities and feels quite cozy.
- The room is cleaned every day; the hotel uses a very fragrant citronella essential oil. I really like this point.
- Cleanliness: both the room and bathroom are clean and tidy.
- It's not too noisy, but the soundproofing is relatively decent.
- The staff is very quick to support, enthusiastic, and friendly.
- Oh, for those who are sensitive to spiritual matters, I felt quite "at ease" and slept very well, haha.
- The hotel also rents out motorbikes - I found the bikes to be quite new.

reviews.title: Very pleased
reviews.text:
I booked 2 nights at Sunset Hill Hotel and was very satisfied. There is nothing to criticize about the room and the prices are reasonable.
- Room: Decorated harmoniously, simply but beautifully.
- Staff and reception: Polite, soft-spoken.
- Bed linens: Clean, neat, soft and lightly fragrant, with no detergent smell. Pillowcases are white without stains (being too meticulous can be tiring but better than the opposite), and the sheets are pure white. During my second night, the staff cleaned again. My biggest fear is smelly or dirty beddings due to negligence (but I would give this hotel a perfect score).
- Bathroom: Clean, no odors. I tend to be quite picky and noticed that the shower grout was very clean and white. Fully equipped with necessary items, although I suggest adding hand soap. Towels are also very fragrant, soft, and without stains.
- View: Nice with a balcony and very beautiful scenery.
- Check-in/out: During my stay, many guests had booked, so I couldn't check in early or check out late. This is obviously according to hotel policy, but I might have been a bit demanding, however, the hotel would likely allow check-in/out whenever possible to assist guests.
- Lobby: Not very soundproof when guests converse loudly outside (but who stays in the lobby all the time anyway).
HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!
If I have the chance to return, I will definitely choose to stay here again and recommend it to my friends ;)
Oh, I almost forgot: I suggest remeasuring the map directions. When you get to the end of the street, you should go about 5-10 meters before turning left to go straight down. The map directed me to turn immediately, which caused me to go the wrong way and then I had to walk back down to turn at the original spot (that wrong turn was a bit scary).

reviews.title: Phòng sạch sẽ, tiện nghi và nhân viên thân thiện ❤️
reviews.text: Nhóm mình đặt 2 phòng trong chuyến đi vừa rồi, mọi thứ đều chỉn chu, sạch sẽ. Phòng sẽ được dọn mỗi ngày, nước cũng được refill đều đặn. Mình thấy trong cùng tầm giá thì ít có ks nào ở ĐL hiện tại thực hiện việc vệ sinh + refill như vậy (nếu không được yêu cầu), bọn mình đánh giá cao về việc này. Ks cũng có ban công riêng (có mái che) để mng có nhu cầu ăn uống, mở tiệc vẫn ok. Trừ việc vị trí hơi xa trung tâm 1 chút, cách ~ 4km thì mọi trải nghiệm của mình tại Sunset Hill xứng đáng được 5 sao

reviews.text: Mùa hè Đà Lạt ngày càng nóng hơn mà phòng thì chỉ có cây quạt, trưa đến tối ngủ không đắp chăn, bật quạt vẫn nóng. Bình thường mình thuê xe đổ xăng 70k dư sức đi 4-5 ngày ở Đà Lạt, còn thuê ở khách sạn không biết sao đổ 70k đến ngày thứ 2 còn đúng 1 nấc xăng, ngày thứ 3 xe báo xăng sắp hết, trong khi đó mình ở 4n3đ chỉ đi vòng quanh gần chợ Đà Lạt

reviews.title: Good hotel with a nice chill view
reviews.text:
We come to Dalat at a cold day. Start staying at Sunset Hill with a good experience, higher than my expectation when booking. Clean room with good smell. There is motorbike for rent right at the hotel.

One minus point is quite far from central of Dalat, but, it's suitable for those who like quite atmosphere and peaceful feeling.

Will come back

reviews.title: Sạch sẽ, ổn
reviews.text:
Phòng sạch sẽ, thoáng mát, view giống hình.  Nhân viên và chủ hiền lành lịch sự. Toilet dùng chung ở sảnh cũng sạch sẽ. Có chỗ đậu xe máy tuy nhiên đậu ngoài trời. 
Khuyết điểm: Mặc dù có thang máy nhưng nhân viên nên phụ KH mang vali và hành lí vào phòng, thay vì để khách tự kéo vali đi tìm phòng.
Cách âm hơi kém.
Đề xuất: tại đầu đường nên cắm biển hiệu tên KS để chỉ đường. Tìm KH khó, và book grab hay taxi cũng khó.
=> Sẽ giới thiệu cho bạn bè. Còn riêng mình thì lần sau sẽ trải nghiệm chỗ khác trong cùng tầm giá để tìm nơi có bồn tắm hehe (giá bên đây cũng không rẻ, nhưng hợp lí với độ sạch sẽ)
